name: Swiggy
description: Food delivery and quick commerce platform serving 500+ Indian cities with Instamart 10-minute grocery delivery
pros: Instamart quick commerce delivers groceries in 10 minutes
Swiggy One membership with free delivery and extra discounts
cons: Prosus (Netherlands/SA) holds 31% stake — largest foreign shareholder
Platform commission impacts restaurant prices (food costs more on Swiggy)
Instamart prices higher than local grocery stores
userComplaints: Food prices on Swiggy are 20-30% higher than ordering directly
Delivery fees and surge charges make small orders expensive
Order accuracy issues — wrong items, missing items common
